nodes.name: 🔔 Webhook — Content to Screen
nodes.notes: Called before ANY content is published. Receives {content, content_type, product_name, brand_id}. Returns {approved, flags, cleaned_content, verdict}.

nodes.name: ⚡ Fast Pre-Screen (Keyword Check)
nodes.notes: Stage 1: Fast keyword check. Hard-blocked terms = instant reject. Clearly halal content = instant pass. Ambiguous = goes to Ollama for deep review. Saves processing time by not sending obvious cases to Ollama.

nodes.name: 🔀 Route by Pre-Screen Result
nodes.notes: Routes: Hard blocked → instant reject node. Fast pass → instant approve node. Needs review → Ollama deep analysis.

nodes.name: 🚫 Instant Reject
nodes.notes: Hard blocked content. Product discarded, logged, and you get notified.

nodes.name: ✅ Instant Approve
nodes.notes: Clearly halal content. Fast-tracked without using Ollama resources.

values.content:
You are a halal content compliance reviewer for a Muslim-owned digital product business. Your job is to review digital product content and determine if it is permissible (halal) to sell and promote.

You follow mainstream Sunni Islamic principles. You understand:
- Riba (interest) is haram — any financial content promoting interest-based products is not permitted
- Content must not promote alcohol, pork, gambling, adult content, black magic/occult, or violence
- Music is a grey area — flag it for human review rather than outright block unless it is clearly promoting music as a lifestyle
- Astrology/horoscopes as belief systems are not permitted but 'star-themed' aesthetic art is fine
- Halloween as a cultural/aesthetic theme (pumpkins, autumn) may be acceptable; occult themes are not
- Modest fashion templates are fine; provocative fashion is not
- Regular saving/budgeting content is halal; interest-based financial products are not
- Business and entrepreneurship content is generally halal
- You are practical and not overly strict on ambiguous aesthetic matters

Always respond in valid JSON only.

nodes.name: 🧠 Ollama Halal Reviewer (mistral)
nodes.notes: mistral at low temperature (0.3) for consistent, conservative halal review. Low temp = more predictable, less creative = better for compliance tasks. Reviews ambiguous content flagged by pre-screen.

nodes.name: 🔀 Merge All Verdict Paths
nodes.notes: Collects outputs from all 3 paths (instant reject, instant approve, AI review) into single consistent output format.

nodes.name: 📊 Log to Halal_Review_Log
nodes.notes: Every content piece gets logged. Creates an auditable halal compliance trail. You can review this log weekly.

nodes.name: 📋 Queue for Human Review
nodes.notes: Ambiguous content goes here. Open the Halal_Human_Review_Queue tab, review the flags and suggested edits, then set YOUR_DECISION to APPROVED or REJECTED.

nodes.name: 📤 Return Halal Verdict
nodes.notes: Returns verdict to calling workflow. If approved=true, content proceeds to publishing. If approved=false or needs_human_review=true, the calling workflow pauses.

meta.description: Workflow 07: Halal Content Guardian. 3-stage screening: (1) Fast keyword pre-screen — hard blocks instant reject, clearly halal instant approve; (2) Ollama mistral deep review for ambiguous content; (3) Human review queue for uncertain cases. All decisions logged to Google Sheets. Called before any content is published.
